_comment: Metro alerts feed for MetrouBUC app. Edit this file and commit to update alerts in the app — no app release needed.

_schema.id: Unique string ID — never reuse an old ID
_schema.title: Short title shown in notification (keep under 60 chars)
_schema.body: Full description shown in the alerts list
_schema.type: CLOSURE | DELAY | DISRUPTION | NEW_STATION | SCHEDULE_CHANGE | MAINTENANCE | INFO
_schema.lines: Array of affected line codes, e.g. ["M1", "M2"]. Use [] for all lines.
_schema.stations: Array of affected station names. Use [] if not station-specific.
_schema.timestamp: Unix timestamp (seconds) — when the alert was created
_schema.expires_at: Unix timestamp (seconds) — when to auto-hide the alert. 0 = never expires.

alerts.title: Welcome to Service Alerts
alerts.body: This is where you'll see live updates about station closures, delays, new stations, and service disruptions. Check back here whenever you plan your journey.
